sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41433" key="e)pitrito/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρῐτόω</orth>, <sense id="n41433.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">repeat for the third time,</tr_> Anaxil.I.</sense> </entryFree>
